message.content:
Very thorough exploration of all UI components and pages in the Rearden web app. I need a complete inventory of every component file (.tsx) and its corresponding style file (.module.scss) in `apps/web/src/`. 

List EVERY file path for:
1. All page components (in src/pages/)
2. All shared components (in src/components/)
3. All context files (in src/contexts/)

For each component, note what it renders (buttons, cards, inputs, etc.) and any visual characteristics.

Working directory: C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden

Now let me check the context files to complete the inventory:

Perfect! Now let me create a comprehensive inventory report. I have all the information needed.

## Complete UI Component Inventory - Rearden Web App

I've conducted a thorough exploration of all UI components in `apps/web/src/`. Here's the complete inventory:

### PAGE COMPONENTS (in `src/pages/`)

#### 1. Landing Page
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Landing\Landing.tsx`
- **Style**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Landing\Landing.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Hero section with animated heading/subheading, feature cards grid (3 cards with icons), stats section (3 stat blocks), CTA section with Logo component
- **Visual**: Spring animations on all elements, gradient text, strikethrough text, hero glow effect, motion-driven stagger animations

#### 2. Search Page
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Search\Search.tsx`
- **Style**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Search\Search.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Header with title/subtitle, SearchBar component, grid of CandidateCard components, error state, loading skeleton grid, empty state with icon
- **Visual**: Staggered card animations, skeleton loaders with animated shimmer effect

#### 3. Register Page
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Register\Register.tsx`
- **Style**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Register\Register.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Header section, form grid with 6 Input fields (Name, Email, Job Title, Location, Experience, Skills), textarea Bio field, VideoUpload component, submit button
- **Visual**: Form animations, video preview display

#### 4. Candidate Profile Page
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\CandidateProfile\CandidateProfile.tsx`
- **Style**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\CandidateProfile\CandidateProfile.module.scss`
- **Renders**: VideoPlayer component, name/title section, 3 meta info items (location, experience, availability), About section with bio, Skills section with SkillTag components, action buttons (Contact Candidate, Back to Search), loading spinner, error state
- **Visual**: Staggered animations for video and info sections, icon-based metadata display

#### 5. Chat Page (Main)
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Chat\Chat.tsx`
- **Style**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\pages\Chat\Chat.module.scss`
- **Renders**: ChatSidebar (desktop) and ChatConversation (desktop), mobile single-panel with animated transitions between sidebar/conversation
- **Visual**: Desktop layout with sidebar + main area, mobile responsive drawer with spring animations

#### 5a. Chat Sub-components (in `src/pages/Chat/`)

**ChatConversation**
- **Files**: `ChatConversation.tsx`, `ChatConversation.module.scss`
- **Renders**: ChatConversationHeader, ChatMessageList, ChatMessageInput, or empty state
- **Visual**: Flex layout with header/messages/input flow

**ChatConversationHeader**
- **Files**: `ChatConversationHeader.tsx`, `ChatConversationHeader.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Back button, avatar (initial letter), candidate name, pin toggle button
- **Visual**: Compact header with icon buttons

**ChatMessageList**
- **Files**: `ChatMessageList.tsx`, `ChatMessageList.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Messages grouped by date, ChatDateDivider components between groups, ChatMessageBubble for each message, ChatTypingIndicator, auto-scroll to bottom
- **Visual**: Grouped message layout with date separators, fade-in animations for new messages

**ChatMessageBubble**
- **Files**: `ChatMessageBubble.tsx`, `ChatMessageBubble.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Message bubble with text, timestamp, different styling for "mine" vs "theirs"
- **Visual**: Aligned left/right based on sender role, time displayed in corner

**ChatMessageInput**
- **Files**: `ChatMessageInput.tsx`, `ChatMessageInput.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Auto-expanding textarea, send button (SVG icon), connection status feedback
- **Visual**: Adjusts height dynamically, button springs on tap, disabled state when disconnected

**ChatEmptyState**
- **Files**: `ChatEmptyState.tsx`, `ChatEmptyState.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Large icon, title, subtitle
- **Visual**: Centered layout with help text

**ChatDateDivider**
- **Files**: `ChatDateDivider.tsx`, `ChatDateDivider.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Simple horizontal divider with date label
- **Visual**: Centered label with lines on sides

**ChatTypingIndicator**
- **Files**: `ChatTypingIndicator.tsx`, `ChatTypingIndicator.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Message bubble with name + "is typing" + 3 animated dots
- **Visual**: Dots animate up/down in sequence with easing

**ChatSidebar**
- **Files**: `ChatSidebar.tsx`, `ChatSidebar.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Header with "Messages" title, ChatSearch component, ChatTabBar, list of ChatConversationItem components, empty message
- **Visual**: Vertical list layout

**ChatSearch**
- **Files**: `ChatSearch.tsx`, `ChatSearch.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Search icon + input field
- **Visual**: Subtle input with icon

**ChatTabBar**
- **Files**: `ChatTabBar.tsx`, `ChatTabBar.module.scss`
- **Renders**: 3 tab buttons (All, Unread, Pinned) with animated layout indicator
- **Visual**: Underline indicator with spring animation

**ChatConversationItem**
- **Files**: `ChatConversationItem.tsx`, `ChatConversationItem.module.scss`
- **Renders**: Avatar (initial letter), conversation name, last message preview, timestamp (time ago), pin icon, unread badge, pin button

### CONTEXT FILES (in `src/contexts/`)

All context files export provider components and custom hooks:

#### 1. ChatContext
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\contexts\ChatContext.tsx`
- **Provides**: Conversations list, active conversation, active messages, active tab (all/unread/pinned), search query, typing indicators, connection status
- **Methods**: setActiveTab, setSearchQuery, openConversation, closeConversation, sendMessage, startConversation, togglePin
- **State**: WebSocket integration for real-time messaging

#### 2. NotificationContext
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\contexts\NotificationContext.tsx`
- **Provides**: Notifications array, unread count
- **Methods**: dismiss, markRead, markAllRead
- **State**: Initial notifications + mock incoming notifications with delays

#### 3. ThemeContext
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\contexts\ThemeContext.tsx`
- **Provides**: Current theme, setTheme method
- **Themes** (10 total): y2k, purple-night, rearden-metal, steel-frost, forge, neon, daylight, bliss, aurora, meadow
- **State**: localStorage persistence with key "rearden-theme"

#### 4. SidebarContext
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\contexts\SidebarContext.tsx`
- **Provides**: open boolean, toggle and close methods
- **State**: Mobile sidebar drawer state management

#### 5. SoundContext
- **File**: `C:\Users\yakik\Documents\projects\rearden\apps\web\src\contexts\SoundContext.tsx`
- **Provides**: enabled boolean, setEnabled method, playSound function
- **Sounds**: click, hover, success, error, notify, navigate
- **State**: Uses Web Audio API for synthesized sound generation with localStorage persistence

### SUMMARY STATISTICS

- **Total Page Components**: 5 main pages
- **Total Chat Sub-components**: 11 specialized components for Chat page
- **Total Shared Components**: 21 reusable components
- **Total Context Providers**: 5 context APIs
- **SCSS Modules**: 38 style files (all components except PageTransition and router have .module.scss)
- **Animation Library**: Motion v12 (Framer Motion successor) used throughout with spring physics

**Key Visual Patterns**:
- Spring-based animations throughout (stiffness: 300-400, damping: 25-35)
- Staggered child animations for lists/grids
- Motion's `layoutId` for shared element transitions (nav indicator, tab indicator)
- Drag-and-drop for video upload
- Auto-scrolling for chat messages
- Real-time typing indicators
- Responsive design with desktop/mobile variants (sidebar, chat layout)
